recap: Added disable-file= scan and filter to lint-custom-run; 3 zsh-lint tests and 1 bats-lint test added covering single-rule, multi-rule, and additive comment scenarios.

Added # zsh-lint disable-file=commandTooLong as first output line in generateDistZsh() of projects-build and colors-build, and prepended to the output string in filetypes-build; fixed pre-existing commandTooLong violation in projects-build by splitting long jq line.
